settings.heading: Birthday Banners & Backdrops
settings.description: Custom printed birthday banners, party backdrops and celebration displays. Personalised designs for milestone birthdays, children's parties and surprise celebrations.

settings.heading: Birthday Designs
settings.subheading: Choose from our ready-made birthday designs or upload your own personalised artwork.

settings.title: Classic Birthday
settings.description: Bold text with balloons and confetti

settings.title: Photo Birthday Banner
settings.description: Add your own photos to the design

settings.question: Can I personalise my birthday banner?
settings.answer: Yes. Add names, ages, photos and your own message. Upload your artwork or choose one of our ready-made designs and we'll personalise it for you.

settings.question: How long does delivery take?
settings.answer: Standard production is 2-3 working days. Express next-day options are available on request.

settings.question: Can I use it outdoors?
settings.answer: Yes. Our birthday banners are printed on durable PVC and are suitable for indoor and outdoor use.

settings.question: What finishing options are available?
settings.answer: Choose from eyelets, hem and eyelets, or pole pockets depending on how you plan to hang your banner.

settings.heading: Ready to order your birthday banner?
settings.description: Upload your artwork or get in touch for a personalised design.
